nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ruggles was born in 1497, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Ruggles, was 28 and his mother, Mrs William Ruggles, was 28. He married Mrs Thomas Ruggles about 1521, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

ko.Holton-cum-Beckering, Lincolnshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 홀턴 c 벡링
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ruggles(이)가 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ruggles(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Ruggles(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1521년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Mrs Thomas Ruggles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수폴크 수드버이에 묻혔다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Thomas Ruggles около 1521 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия.
